parameters.body: {"prompt": "You are the lead researcher and content strategist for Ruins Untold, a long-form YouTube channel covering ancient mysteries, forbidden archaeology, and alternative history. Generate exactly 5 video ideas as a pure JSON array with no markdown fences, no preamble, and no explanation. Each idea must use this exact schema: {topic: short punchy title 5-10 words, angle: 3-5 sentences opening with mainstream consensus then cracking it with a physical anomaly naming the gatekeeper and ending on the unanswered question, key_evidence: minimum 4 specific items with paper titles dates artifacts locations documents years, key_researchers: named individuals with roles always including at least one antagonist labeled as such, related_video: prior Ruins Untold episode or none yet, hook_style: one of question statement contradiction anomaly revelation, tone_dial: integer 6-7 default never exceed 8}. Rules: every idea needs a concrete physical anomaly, a named gatekeeper institution, and specific dated sources. Topics must span different eras regions and artifact types. Output ONLY the raw JSON array starting with [ and ending with ]. No other text."}
